subcodes.first_line: At all times doth the Most Exalted Pen summon the denizens of the realm of existence unto the Dayspring of the All-Merciful's revelation, yet most among them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در جمیع احیان قلم اعلی اهل امکانرا بمطلع وحی رحمن دعوت مینماید ولکن اکثری از
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual transformation, @call to action, @rejection, opposition and persecution
